identity.name: PromoUp - The Modern Prism
identity.core_concept: Crystal clear management for vibrant displays. The interface is the invisible glass; the promotion is the light.

primary.description: Deep Slate for Sidebar and Primary Navigation. Grounds the light interface.

accent.description: Interstellar Blue. Used for Primary Actions (Save, Add, Connect). High trust.

background.description: Slate 50 for app background to reduce eye strain compared to pure white. Pure white for cards.

status.description: Standardized functional colors for connectivity status (TV Online/Offline).

text.description: High contrast Slate 900 for headings, Slate 500 for body/labels.

headings.usage: Page Titles, Card Headers, Modal Titles. Banned: Inter for headings.

mono.usage: IP Addresses, Ports, Database Paths, System IDs.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Fixed Left) + Header (Status) + Main Content Area (Scrollable).
dashboard.grid: Bento Grid approach for status widgets. 4 columns on large screens.
dashboard.spacing: Relaxed. p-8 for main content area. gap-6 for grid items.

wizard.structure: Step Progress Indicator (Top or Left) + Form Content (Center) + Action Bar (Bottom Fixed).
wizard.style: Clean, numbered steps. Current step highlighted in Blue.

timeline.visual: Film-strip aesthetic. Each item is a 'Frame' with time duration clearly visible.

tv_display.structure: Fullscreen, 100vh/100vw. No padding. Absolute positioning for overlays.

cards.style: Flat white background, 1px border-slate-200. No shadow by default. Hover: shadow-md + scale-[1.01] transition.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-white text-red-600 border border-red-200 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-md

inputs.style: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 rounded-md h-10 px-3
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5 block

status_badge.online: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800
status_badge.offline: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-red-100 text-red-800

placeholders.description: Woman in fashion store, good for 'Clothing Category' demo.
Gourmet burgers, ideal for 'Food Promo' example.
TV screen close up, good for 'Device Management' thumbnail.
Storefront sign, good for 'Establishment' generic image.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_extension: CRITICAL: Use .js extension for all React files. Do not use .tsx or .ts. The project is JavaScript based.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: CRITICAL: Add data-testid to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, cards). Format: 'page-section-element-action'. Example: 'dashboard-sidebar-tv-link'.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all icons (Activity, Tv, Settings, Calendar, Play, Pause, Trash).
instructions_to_main_agent.mock_data: Create a robust 'mockService.js' to simulate Firebird data (Products, Categories) since real DB is not available yet.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Use 'react-router-dom'. Define specific routes for public displays: '/display/:tvId'.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_components: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component that wraps the Sidebar and Header to ensure consistency across admin pages.

universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grid-cols-12 for complex data.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. p-4 is minimum for containers, p-8 is standard.
Never use full transparent backgrounds on headers with content behind them.
Always provide visual feedback for actions (Toasts for 'Saved', 'Connected', 'Error').
